artPrompt: A dramatic moment as a sweating mayor grips a podium at the reservoir's edge mid-press-conference, jabbing a finger at the bubbling green water behind him, a cluster of clipboard-clutching aides shrinking back as sickly bioluminescent mist rises. A blank backdrop banner and rusted pipes haze under a bruised stormy sky. Low film-still angle of defensive spectacle, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: The Mayor Blames the Water
text: The Mayor holds a press conference: each opponent sacrifices a creature unless they roll a five or higher on a six-sided die. Every die rolled this way puts a sludge counter on a creature you control. The Mayor takes no questions.
flavorText: "At no point did this administration dump anything. Next question. No, not you."
